# CWE-213 negative: policy-specific DTO hides salary from guests
lang: go
file: CWE-213-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

type employeeProfile struct {
	Name   string `json:"name"`
	Team   string `json:"team"`
	Salary int    `json:"salary"`
}

type guestProfile struct {
	Name string `json:"name"`
	Team string `json:"team"`
}

// CWE-213 Exposure of Sensitive Information Due to Incompatible Policies (mitigated)
func PublicProfile(c *gin.Context, directory map[string]employeeProfile) {
	id := c.Param("id")
	profile, ok := directory[id]
	if !ok {
		c.JSON(http.StatusNotFound, gin.H{"error": "missing"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, guestProfile{Name: profile.Name, Team: profile.Team})
}
